items.raw: Upper Control Cover Material needs to be streamlined with the lines of the bucket cover (no spacing or gaps between them. Meaning, the overall outline/footprint of the cover has the same outside dimensions all the way around. It's "flush".)

items.text: Add much more material going down/around the upper control cover
items.raw: There needs to be MUCH more material going down/around the upper control cover than either prototype currently has. Without enough cover material going around the upper control panel, the upper control aspect of this bucket cover is useless.
